heading: Base acres
label: 9012 Base acres

children.heading: Retention or 1-time reallocation of base acres
children.label: a Retention or 1-time reallocation of base acres
i
children.text: to retain base acres, including any generic base acres, as provided in paragraph (2); or

children.label: ii
children.text: in lieu of retaining base acres, to reallocate base acres, other than any generic base acres, as provided in paragraph (3).

children.label: i
children.text: Information that the opportunity of an owner to make the election is being provided only once.

children.label: ii
children.text: Information regarding the manner in which the owner must make the election and the manner of notifying the Secretary of the election.

children.label: iii
children.text: Information regarding the deadline before which the owner must notify the Secretary of the election to be in effect beginning with the 2014 crop year.

children.heading: Effect of failure to make election
children.label: C Effect of failure to make election
children.text: If the owner of a farm fails to make the election under this subsection, or fails to timely notify the Secretary of the election as required by subparagraph (B)(iii), the owner shall be deemed to have elected to retain base acres, including generic base acres, as provided in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Election to retain
children.label: A Election to retain
children.text: For the purpose of applying this subchapter to a covered commodity, the Secretary shall give an owner of a farm an opportunity to elect to retain all of the base acres for each covered commodity on the farm.

children.heading: Treatment of generic base acres
children.label: B Treatment of generic base acres
children.text: Generic base acres are automatically retained.

children.heading: Election to reallocate
children.label: A Election to reallocate
children.text: For the purpose of applying this subchapter to covered commodities, the Secretary shall give an owner of a farm an opportunity to elect to reallocate all of the base acres for covered commodities on the farm, as in effect on , among those covered commodities planted on the farm at any time during the 2009 through 2012 crop years.September 30, 2013

children.label: I
children.text: the acreage planted on the farm to each covered commodity for harvest, grazing, haying, silage, or other similar purposes for the 2009 through 2012 crop years; and

children.label: II
children.text: any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during the 2009 through 2012 crop years to that covered commodity because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary; to

children.label: I
children.text: the acreage planted on the farm to all covered commodities for harvest, grazing, haying, silage, or other similar purposes for such crop years; and

children.label: II
children.text: any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during such crop years to covered commodities because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Treatment of generic base acres
children.label: C Treatment of generic base acres
children.text: Generic base acres are retained and may not be reallocated under this paragraph.

children.heading: Inclusion of all 4 years in average
children.label: D Inclusion of all 4 years in average
children.text: For the purpose of determining a 4-year acreage average under subparagraph (B) for a farm, the Secretary shall not exclude any crop year in which a covered commodity was not planted.

children.heading: Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.label: E Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.text: For the purpose of determining under subparagraph (B) the acreage on a farm that producers planted or were prevented from planting during the 2009 through 2012 crop years to covered commodities, if the acreage that was planted or prevented from being planted was devoted to another covered commodity in the same crop year (other than a covered commodity produced under an established practice of double cropping), the owner may elect the commodity to be used for that crop year in determining the 4-year average, but may not include both the initial commodity and the subsequent commodity.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: F Limitation
children.text: The reallocation of base acres among covered commodities on a farm under this paragraph may not result in a total number of base acres (including generic base acres) for the farm in excess of the number of base acres in effect for the farm on .September 30, 2013

children.heading: Application of election to all covered commodities
children.label: 4 Application of election to all covered commodities
children.text: The election made under this subsection, or deemed to be made under paragraph (1)(C), with respect to a farm shall apply to all of the covered commodities on the farm.

children.label: A
children.text: A conservation reserve contract entered into under section 1231 of the Food Security Act of 1985 () with respect to the farm expires or is voluntarily terminated.16 U.S.C. 3831

children.label: B
children.text: Cropland is released from coverage under a conservation reserve contract by the Secretary.

children.label: C
children.text: The producer has eligible oilseed acreage as the result of the Secretary designating additional oilseeds, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under .section 8711(a)(1)(D) of this title

children.heading: Special conservation reserve acreage payment rules
children.label: 2 Special conservation reserve acreage payment rules
children.text: For the crop year in which a base acres adjustment under subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) is first made, the owner of the farm shall elect to receive price loss coverage or agriculture risk coverage with respect to the acreage added to the farm under this subsection or a prorated payment under the conservation reserve contract, but not both.

children.heading: Prevention of excess base acres
children.label: c Prevention of excess base acres

children.heading: Required reduction
children.label: 1 Required reduction
children.text: Notwithstanding the election made under subsection (a), if the sum of the base acres for a farm, including generic base acres, and the acreage described in paragraph (2) exceeds the actual cropland acreage of the farm, the Secretary shall reduce the base acres for 1 or more covered commodities or generic base acres for the farm so that the sum of the base acres, including generic base acres, and the acreage described in paragraph (2) does not exceed the actual cropland acreage of the farm.

children.label: i
children.text: the conservation reserve program established under subchapter B of chapter 1 of subtitle D of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.); or16 U.S.C. 3831

children.label: ii
children.text: a wetland reserve easement under section 1265C of the Food Security Act of 1985 ().16 U.S.C. 3865c

children.label: B
children.text: Any other acreage on the farm enrolled in a Federal conservation program for which payments are made in exchange for not producing an agricultural commodity on the acreage.

children.label: C
children.text: If the Secretary designates additional oilseeds, any eligible oilseed acreage, which shall be determined in the same manner as eligible oilseed acreage under subsection (b)(1)(C).

children.heading: Selection of acres
children.label: 3 Selection of acres
children.text: The Secretary shall give the owner of the farm the opportunity to select the base acres for a covered commodity or generic base acres for the farm against which the reduction required by paragraph (1) will be made.

children.heading: Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.label: 4 Exception for double-cropped acreage
children.text: In applying paragraph (1), the Secretary shall make an exception in the case of double cropping, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The owner of a farm may reduce, at any time, the base acres for any covered commodity or generic base acres for the farm.

children.heading: Effect of reduction
children.label: B Effect of reduction
children.text: A reduction under subparagraph (A) shall be permanent and made in a manner prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: remains devoted to commercial agricultural production; or

children.label: ii
children.text: is likely to be returned to the previous agricultural use.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: B Requirement
children.text: The Secretary shall establish procedures to identify land described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Treatment of base acres on farms entirely planted to grass or pasture
children.label: 3 Treatment of base acres on farms entirely planted to grass or pasture

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of a farm on which all of the cropland was planted to grass or pasture (including cropland that was idle or fallow), as determined by the Secretary, during the period beginning on , and ending on , the Secretary shall maintain all base acres and payment yields for the covered commodities on the farm, except that no payment shall be made with respect to those base acres under section 9016 or 9017 of this title for the 2019 through 2031 crop years.January 1, 2009December 31, 2017

children.heading: Ineligibility
children.label: B Ineligibility
children.text: The producers on a farm for which all of the base acres are maintained under subparagraph (A) shall be ineligible for the option to change the election applicable to the producers on the farm under .section 9015(h) of this title

children.heading: Prohibition on reconstitution of farm
children.label: 4 Prohibition on reconstitution of farm
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that producers on a farm do not reconstitute the farm to void or change the treatment of base acres under this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: As soon as practicable after , and notwithstanding subsection (a), the Secretary shall provide notice to owners of eligible farms pursuant to paragraph (3) and allocate to those eligible farms a total of not more than an additional 30,000,000 base acres in the manner provided in this subsection. An owner of a farm that is eligible to receive an allocation of base acres may elect to not receive that allocation by notifying the Secretary not later than 90 days after receipt of the notice provided by the Secretary under this paragraph.July 4, 2025

children.label: A
children.text: Information that the allocation is occurring.

children.label: B
children.text: Information regarding the eligibility of the farm for an allocation of base acres under paragraph (3).

children.label: C
children.text: Information regarding how an owner may appeal a determination of ineligibility for an allocation of base acres under paragraph (3) through an appeals process established by the Secretary.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (D), effective beginning with the 2026 crop year, a farm is eligible to receive an allocation of base acres if, with respect to the farm, the amount described in subparagraph (B) exceeds the amount described in subparagraph (C).

children.label: I
children.text: the acreage planted on the farm to all covered commodities for harvest, grazing, haying, silage or other similar purposes for the 2019 through 2023 crop years; and

children.label: II
children.text: any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during the 2019 through 2023 crop years to covered commodities because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary; plus

children.label: I
children.text: 15 percent of the total acres on the farm; and

children.label: aa
children.text: the acreage planted on the farm to eligible noncovered commodities for harvest, grazing, haying, silage, or other similar purposes for the 2019 through 2023 crop years; and

children.label: bb
children.text: any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during the 2019 through 2023 crop years to eligible noncovered commodities because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Total number of base acres for covered commodities
children.label: C Total number of base acres for covered commodities
children.text: The amount described in this subparagraph, with respect to a farm, is the total number of base acres for covered commodities on the farm (excluding unassigned crop base), as in effect on .September 30, 2024

children.heading: Effect of no recent plantings of covered commodities
children.label: D Effect of no recent plantings of covered commodities
children.text: In the case of a farm for which the amount determined under clause (i) of subparagraph (B) is equal to zero, that farm shall be ineligible to receive an allocation of base acres under this subsection.

children.heading: Acreage planted on the farm to eligible noncovered commodities defined
children.label: E Acreage planted on the farm to eligible noncovered commodities defined
children.text: In this paragraph, the term “acreage planted on the farm to eligible noncovered commodities” means acreage planted on a farm to commodities other than covered commodities, trees, bushes, vines, grass, or pasture (including cropland that was idle or fallow), as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: be equal to the difference obtained by subtracting the amount determined under subparagraph (C) of paragraph (3) from the amount determined under subparagraph (B) of that paragraph; and

children.label: B
children.text: include unassigned crop base.

children.heading: Allocation
children.label: A Allocation
children.text: The Secretary shall allocate the number of base acres under paragraph (4) among those covered commodities planted on the farm at any time during the 2019 through 2023 crop years.

children.label: I
children.text: the acreage planted on the farm to each covered commodity for harvest, grazing, haying, silage, or other similar purposes for the 2019 through 2023 crop years; and

children.label: II
children.text: any acreage on the farm that the producers were prevented from planting during the 2019 through 2023 crop years to that covered commodity because of drought, flood, or other natural disaster, or other condition beyond the control of the producers, as determined by the Secretary; to

children.label: ii
children.text: the 5-year average determined under paragraph (3)(B)(i).

children.heading: Inclusion of all 5 years in average
children.label: C Inclusion of all 5 years in average
children.text: For the purpose of determining a 5-year acreage average under subparagraph (B) for a farm, the Secretary shall not exclude any crop year in which a covered commodity was not planted.

children.heading: Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.label: D Treatment of multiple planting or prevented planting
children.text: For the purpose of determining under subparagraph (B) the acreage on a farm that producers planted or were prevented from planting during the 2019 through 2023 crop years to covered commodities, if the acreage that was planted or prevented from being planted was devoted to another covered commodity in the same crop year (other than a covered commodity produced under an established practice of double cropping), the owner may elect the covered commodity to be used for that crop year in determining the 5-year average, but may not include both the initial covered commodity and the subsequent covered commodity.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: E Limitation
children.text: The allocation of additional base acres among covered commodities on a farm under this paragraph may not result in a total number of base acres for the farm in excess of the total number of acres on the farm.

children.heading: Reduction by the Secretary
children.label: 6 Reduction by the Secretary
children.text: In carrying out this subsection, if the total number of eligible acres allocated to base acres across all farms in the United States under this subsection would exceed 30,000,000 acres, the Secretary shall apply an across-the-board, pro-rata reduction to the number of eligible acres to ensure the number of allocated base acres under this subsection is equal to 30,000,000 acres.

children.label: A
children.text: the payment yield established on the farm for the applicable covered commodity; and

children.label: i
children.text: equal to the average payment yield for the covered commodity for the county in which the farm is situated; or

children.label: ii
children.text: determined pursuant to .section 9013(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: eligibility under paragraph (3);

children.label: B
children.text: eligible acres under paragraph (4); and

children.label: C
children.text: the allocation of acres under paragraph (5).
